title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: In Madurai South constituency, it is Vaiko loyalist vs. BJP karyakarta
description: While Sumathi of the NTK and J.Jo Peter of the TVK are also in the fray, working hard to make a mark, the real fight appears to be between Pudur M. Boominathan and ‘Professor’ Sreenivasan, who is supported by the AIADMK, AMMK, the PMK, John Pandian’s outfit and other parties
